## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Content Operations Specialist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role combines expertise in AI prompting/workflows with project/account management](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Yana has diverse experience in journalism, AI training, and building content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Position involves client communication, workflow optimization, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [GrowthX's product is similar to Yana's past work but on a larger scale](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Evolution

  - [Content Operations Specialist role combines two aspects:](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
      - [Expertise in AI prompting, workflows, and process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [Project management and account management responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Position involves client interaction, managing day-to-day delivery, and addressing blockers](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Role has evolved since the initial job posting](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [8+ years in journalism, progressing from journalist to editor](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Transitioned to AI in 2023, starting with AI training and progressing to team lead](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Recent focus on creating AI workflows for websites and blogs using Zapier](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Experience in restructuring news, creating content backgrounds, fact-checking, and full content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

### Workflow and Project Management

  - [Uses Zapier to build workflows for various content-related tasks](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Manages multiple projects using Trello and calendar planning](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Prioritizes based on urgency, importance, and ability to delegate](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Sets internal deadlines 20% before actual deadlines to maintain buffer](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

### Content Quality Control

  - [Emphasizes quality control throughout the process, not just at the end](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [Recommends human review of prompts and outlines before final output](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Stresses the importance of well-structured prompts and style guides](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)

### Client Communication

  - [Weekly status updates via Slack and meetings](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Delivers content through Airtable (Content OS)](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Responsible for ongoing brief updates and gathering new information from clients](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### Ideal Candidate Traits

  - [Curiosity to troubleshoot and improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Willingness to work with engineers and file tickets for product improvements](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Ability to identify issues and suggest changes in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/jvndSQF9r3dXPkuwzEoev-deAPD5Kc5B?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

## Next Steps

  - Yana to provide additional details about projects or experience if requested
  - GrowthX team to review Yana's qualifications against evolved role requirements
  - Potential follow-up communication via LinkedIn or email if more information is needed
